title: Spend Approval Request
description: POST /api/v1/billing/spend-approvals — request approval for a spend operation above policy thresholds.

operation_group_id.description: Operation group the spend belongs to.

pricing_version.description: Pricing version used for the estimate.

requested_estimate_usd.description: Estimated spend in USD (number or decimal string). String branch must be a non-negative decimal with at most 6 fractional digits; number branch bounded to [0, 1,000,000]. Schema-level sanity bound to reject negative/non-numeric/absurd estimates (mirrors wallet_admin_adjustment_request money-bounds pattern); authoritative policy-threshold enforcement is backend-side.
